summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Clicking 'Day' and 'Long' tabs in AutoTrade.jsx no longer crashes with 'not defined' error. Root cause was ExplanationCard component referencing 'livePrices' without receiving it as a prop. Fix: Added livePrices prop to ExplanationCard (line 229) and passed it from all 5 call sites (lines 1221, 1231, 1247, 1260, 1276).

frontend_tests.access_gate: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page_load: PASS - Auto Trade page loads with AI Auto-Trade header
frontend_tests.day_tab_click: PASS - Day tab clicked without 'not defined' error, shows Day Trading (0) with rejected near-miss candidates
frontend_tests.long_tab_click: PASS - Long tab clicked without 'not defined' error, shows Long-Term (2) with AAOI and AXSM
frontend_tests.candidates_tab_click: PASS - Candidates tab shows AI Classification Summary with 1083 scanned, 22 setups
frontend_tests.scheduler_tab_click: PASS - Scheduler tab shows System Status dashboard
frontend_tests.mtf_heatmap_tab_click: PASS - MTF Heatmap tab shows 22 stocks with classification distribution
frontend_tests.console_errors: PASS - No 'not defined' or 'livePrices' errors in console during tab switching

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Clicking 'Day' and 'Long Term' tabs in AutoTrade.jsx caused a 'not defined' error
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: ExplanationCard component referenced 'livePrices' without receiving it as a prop
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added livePrices prop to ExplanationCard and passed it from all call sites

fix_locations.component_definition: Line 229: const ExplanationCard = ({ item, expanded, onToggle, livePrices = {} }) =>
call_sites: Line 1221: ExplanationCard in Candidates tab (day trades)
Line 1231: ExplanationCard in Candidates tab (long term)
Line 1247: ExplanationCard in Day tab (main list)
Line 1260: ExplanationCard in Day tab (rejected near-miss)

bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All tabs work without crash

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly adds default value livePrices = {} to prevent undefined errors
All 5 ExplanationCard usages now pass livePrices={livePrices} prop
ExplanationCard uses livePrices for displaying live price data with LIVE/STALE/CACHED indicators
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. ExplanationCard now receives livePrices prop correctly. All AutoTrade tabs (Day, Long, Candidates, Scheduler, MTF Heatmap) work without errors. The app shows: Day Trading (0 candidates), Long-Term (2 candidates: AAOI, AXSM), MTF Heatmap (22 stocks analyzed).
features_verified: Auto Trade page navigation via sidebar
Day tab - no crash, shows day trade candidates and rejected near-misses
Long tab - no crash, shows long-term candidates (AAOI, AXSM)
Candidates tab - shows AI Classification Summary with day and long-term side by side
Scheduler tab - shows System Status dashboard
MTF Heatmap tab - shows heatmap data with 22 stocks
